message:
fix(abi): eliminate all libc::syscall calls from unistd_abi.rs

Add syscall wrappers for new mount API (fsopen, fsconfig, fsmount,
fspick, open_tree, move_mount, mount_setattr) and rt_sigreturn.
Migrate closefrom, sigreturn, ntp_gettime, and all mount API functions
to use native raw syscalls instead of libc::syscall.

Remove now-unused syscall_ret_* helper functions.

Progress: 19 -> 0 libc::syscall calls in unistd_abi.rs (100% complete)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
